hyperedges.label: Phase I ingestion fan-in: all consumers normalize and publish to alerts queue
Metrics pipeline: emitters fire to logpose.metrics → MetricsConsumer → MetricsStore → SQLite → FastAPI endpoints
Phase III Splunk fan-out: both enriched queue and alerts.dlq forward to Splunk HEC with distinct sourcetypes

hyperedges.label: Phase I ingestion fan-in: all consumers normalize and publish to alerts queue
Metrics pipeline: emitters fire to logpose.metrics → MetricsConsumer → MetricsStore → SQLite → FastAPI endpoints
Phase III Splunk fan-out: both enriched queue and alerts.dlq forward to Splunk HEC with distinct sourcetypes
